steps: A B C 1 Day Action Notes 2 -1 Coat plates with PDL PDL is stored at -20 at 100x in 400ul aliquots (dilute to 40ml with sterile H2O) 3 0 Prepare plates and transduce cells 4 1 Change media (AGM) 5 2 Change media (AGM + 1ug/ml Puro) 6 3 Change media (NDM + 1ug/ml Puro) 7 4 Check cells, refresh media if there is lots of debris I usually change media here 8 5 Check cells, refresh media if there is lots of debris I usually change media here 9 6 Change media to NDM without puro 10 7 Check cells, refresh media if there is lots of debris I usually do not change media here 11 8 Change media to NDM + BDNF (20ng/ml) + NT-3 (10ng/ml) BDNF and NT3 stocks are both 1000x and are stored at -80C in 50ul aliquots 12 9 Check cells, refresh media if there is lots of debris I usually do not change media here 13 10 Harvest. Proceed to sorting or RNA extraction � 14 15 Be very gentle with all media changes and rinses
creator: Andrea R Daniel
